name: 游戏回合记录查询模板
description: 通过自然语言输入查询和分析游戏回合记录的异常情况
author: 系统管理员

query_template.base_query: SELECT r.round_id, r.merchant_id, r.biz_id, r.user_id, r.game_id, r.bet_amount, r.win_amount, r.game_status, r.start_time, r.end_time, r.created_at, u.username, u.user_level, g.game_name, g.game_type, t.transaction_amount, t.transaction_status, t.transaction_time, m.merchant_name FROM game_rounds r LEFT JOIN users u ON r.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN games g ON r.game_id = g.id LEFT JOIN transactions t ON r.round_id = t.round_id LEFT JOIN merchants m ON r.merchant_id = m.id

anomaly_detection_rules.name: 金额异常检测
anomaly_detection_rules.description: 检测投注金额或中奖金额是否异常
anomaly_detection_rules.message: 检测到金额异常：投注金额超过1万或中奖金额超过5万或中奖倍数超过100倍
anomaly_detection_rules.suggestion: 建议核实用户身份和游戏记录，检查是否存在作弊行为

anomaly_detection_rules.name: 时间异常检测
anomaly_detection_rules.description: 检测游戏时长是否异常
anomaly_detection_rules.condition: TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, end_time) < 1 OR TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, start_time, end_time) > 3600
anomaly_detection_rules.message: 检测到时间异常：游戏时长过短（<1秒）或过长（>1小时）
anomaly_detection_rules.suggestion: 建议检查游戏逻辑和网络连接状况

anomaly_detection_rules.name: 状态异常检测
anomaly_detection_rules.description: 检测游戏状态是否异常
anomaly_detection_rules.message: 检测到状态异常：游戏状态不在正常完成状态列表中
anomaly_detection_rules.suggestion: 建议检查游戏流程和状态更新机制

anomaly_detection_rules.name: 交易异常检测
anomaly_detection_rules.description: 检测交易状态和金额是否匹配
anomaly_detection_rules.condition: (transaction_status = 'success' AND transaction_amount != win_amount) OR (transaction_status = 'failed' AND win_amount > 0)
anomaly_detection_rules.message: 检测到交易异常：交易状态与金额不匹配
anomaly_detection_rules.suggestion: 建议检查支付系统和账务处理逻辑

anomaly_detection_rules.name: 频率异常检测
anomaly_detection_rules.description: 检测用户游戏频率是否异常
anomaly_detection_rules.condition: (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM game_rounds WHERE user_id = r.user_id AND DATE(created_at) = DATE(r.created_at)) > 1000
anomaly_detection_rules.message: 检测到频率异常：用户当日游戏次数超过1000次
anomaly_detection_rules.suggestion: 建议检查是否存在机器人或脚本操作

success_response.message: 查询成功，已完成异常检测分析

error_response.message: 查询失败，请检查输入参数
